modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Webcam microphone requires restart for consistent operation in Zoom.

full_description_text: I am using a HD 1080P webcam on macOS. The video works fine, but the microphone does not. I have to restart my computer before every meeting for it to work. This is very inconvenient.
short_description: Webcam microphone requires restart for consistent operation in Zoom.
description: I am using a HD 1080P webcam on macOS. The video works fine, but the microphone does not. I have to restart my computer before every meeting for it to work. This is very inconvenient.
